When you know something, you might think it is good to tell everyone. You might think that giving all your thoughts to other people is always a good thing. But there are many reasons why this is not always the best way to act.

First, we must think about how people use what they know. Some people are good and want to use your thoughts to help others. But other people are not good. They might use what you know to hurt you or to take things that belong to you. If you tell a bad person how you do something very well, they might use that to make your life hard or to take what you have made. This is a way that people can do bad things.

Second, we must think about how much work it takes to know something. To know a thing well, you often have to spend a long time thinking and working. You have to look at what you know and see if it is right. If you tell everyone everything right away, they might not do the hard work of thinking for themselves. They might just take your thought and keep it. If they keep it, they might not get the good things that come from it.
